SortExec: output_bytes=1
  AggregateExec: output_bytes=1
    CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=1
      FilterExec: output_bytes=1
        CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=2032
          HashJoinExec: output_bytes=2036
            CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=60
              FilterExec: output_bytes=60
                ParquetExec: output_bytes=78750
            ProjectionExec: output_bytes=68
              AggregateExec: output_bytes=66
                CoalesceBatchesExec: output_bytes=1
                  FilterExec: output_bytes=1
                    ProjectionExec: output_bytes=15750
                      ParquetExec: output_bytes=11250
